summary: Yes, there is an associated link between suicide and autism in adolescents due to overlapping psychological features such as poor emotional regulation and known comorbidity within psychiatric spectra. This connection arises from shared vulnerability factors like impaired emotion processing, which increase susceptibility to self-harming behaviors despite lacking explicit statistical confirmation.
